evals.prompt: Add a loading skeleton to the contacts page while data is being fetched
evals.expected_output: A loading.tsx file created for the contacts route
expectations: A loading.tsx file is created at src/app/contacts/loading.tsx
The skeleton uses existing UI components or Tailwind animations
It approximates the layout of the contacts table

evals.prompt: Add a confirmation dialog before archiving a contact
evals.expected_output: Dialog component added to contact-form.tsx with confirm/cancel
expectations: Uses the existing Dialog component from src/components/ui/dialog
Shows before the archive API call is made
Contact name is shown in the confirmation message

evals.prompt: The dashboard stats cards need icons and the overdue count should be red when > 0
expectations: The overdue stat uses red styling when count > 0
